subject: docs: move Expo upgrade from USER_ACTIONS to TODO, add AI lesson
body:
Expo SDK upgrade is an AI task blocked by proxy, not a user action.
Moved to TODO.md. Added AI_MISTAKES entry: always attempt a task
before routing to the user. USER_ACTIONS is for things requiring
human credentials/dashboards, not environment-limited AI tasks.

Tags: documentation, ai-mistakes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: maintenance
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JiHLm7X1zVwrcYAJuVaPFN
